grammarNote.title: Escape: Edge and Fleet
grammarNote.explanation:
Il faut évacuer. Le bord est là. La flotte est là. — evacuation vocabulary. Bord (edge), flotte (fleet), guidage (guidance).

On a paumé tout le monde ! — paumé (lost, slang). The escape succeeds. Past tense (a paumé) marks the completed action.

Re-read and find every new escape word. Can the pictures alone tell you what bord, flotte, and guidage mean?

vocabulary.meaning: to put back, to hand over
